changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Adding tb_sample_id column to sample_item for TB laboratory unique identifier.

changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Creating unique index for tb_sample_id on sample_item.

changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Creating TB sample ID sequence for NNN/YY format generation.

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = 'generate_tb_sample_id'

changeSet.comment: Creating function to generate TB sample ID in NNN/YY format.

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = 'reset_tb_sample_id_seq_if_new_year'

changeSet.comment: Creating function to reset TB sample ID sequence on new year.

changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Creating state table to track current year for TB sample ID sequence.
